colors.name: xuan
colors.role: the paper — cream rice paper, the ground every ridge is brushed on; all contrast figures measured against it (lum 0.852)

colors.name: xuan-aged
colors.role: older paper — scroll-guide panels, hover washes, the aged hem of the page

colors.name: sumi
colors.role: the ink stone, fully ground — primary text, the wordmark 山水, the nearest ridges, the dark study's ground (15.3:1 on xuan)

colors.name: ink-strong
colors.role: sumi with one dip of water — section titles, the second-nearest mountain layer (10.6:1 on xuan)

colors.name: ink-mid
colors.role: sumi thinned further — body prose, the middle ridges (6.6:1, AAA body)

colors.name: ink-soft
colors.role: a pale wash — captions, notes, the far ridges (3.9:1, large/decorative only — never body text)

colors.name: pale-wash
colors.role: the farthest ridges dissolving into mist — canvas mountain layers near the horizon, wash shadows (2.6:1, decorative only)

colors.name: mist
colors.role: the mist itself — canvas fog blobs and pooled valley haze (1.8:1 — paint, never text)

colors.name: vermillion
colors.role: the artist's chop — the seal, the one accent. 5.7:1 on xuan (AA for large text & non-text); 2.7:1 on sumi, so decorative only in the dark study

colors.name: vermillion-deep
colors.role: the banked seal — wherever vermillion must function as text on paper: eyebrows, folio numerals, focus ring, ::selection ground (7.6:1, AA)

fonts.role: Latin voice — the SHAN-SHUI wordmark (500, tracked wide), section titles (400), italic asides. A refined serif that reads like a brush held by a literati hand
every Chinese display glyph — 山水, the seal characters, the vertical couplets. A brush calligraphy (硬笔行楷) face; the strokes still remember the hand. CJK falls through Cormorant into it with no markup
Chinese body & secondary text — where Ma Shan Zheng's calligraphy would be illegible at small sizes. The quiet mincho-voice for prose-scale 中文

texture: Xuan paper in three static layers (the paper is old, never alive): (1) one fixed full-viewport SVG feTurbulence pass — fractalNoise baseFrequency 0.62, 2 octaves, seed 8 — mapped by feColorMatrix to sumi at ≤5% alpha and multiplied over everything (rice-paper fibers, not film grain; it never animates); (2) an aged-amber vignette, radial-gradient to rgba(168,50,50,0.05) at the page edges — the warm rim a real scroll takes on; (3) laid fiber lines — repeating-linear-gradient, 2px of rgba(26,23,20,0.014) every 8px, evoking the bamboo screen xuan is dried on. The canvas landscape paints its own ink over this; the grain sits behind everything as substrate.

motion.name: ease-scroll
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) — every entrance rises fast and settles long, the way a brush lifts

motion.name: ease-stone
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) — the seal press and section pins: deliberate, weighted

motion.name: ridge-noise
motion.value: h(x) = Σ octave value-noise bands — 5 octaves, feature sizes 1/420, 1/180, 1/78, 1/34, 1/16 px⁻¹, amplitudes 1, 0.55, 0.3, 0.16, 0.09 — the mountain silhouette profile, deterministic from a seeded permutation

motion.name: aerial-density
motion.value: each ridge layer's ink alpha = lerp by depth: near 0.82, mid 0.5, far 0.28, farthest 0.14 — 远山如黛, distance is ink density not perspective

motion.name: scroll-parallax
motion.value: layer i translates at rate 0.35·i² × scroll-y within its pinned window; the scroll IS unrolling the hand-scroll, layers part like depth

motion.name: mist-drift
motion.value: mist blobs advect at v = (pointer-bias·0.6 + breeze) px/s, pooled y-bias keeps them in valleys; autonomous breeze 7·sin(0.13t) + 4·sin(0.31t+0.7), periods mutually prime

motion.name: pointer-breath
motion.value: mist target lerps at 0.045/frame toward pointer (attack), 0.016 away (release) — the painting notices a hand and breathes toward it, then forgets slowly

motion.name: seal-press
motion.value: scale 1.18 → 0.96 → 1 with −5° set, 720ms ease-stone, then opacity holds — a chop pressed slightly off-true the way a hand presses one

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 900ms ease-scroll, translateY(16px)→0 + blur(4px)→0, 90ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: glyph-cadence
motion.value: 80ms/glyph for the couplet, 90ms/column stagger — the tick of a brush, not a cursor

motion.name: ambient
motion.value: mist breath 6.8s, hint drift 11.3s — mutually prime, opacity/transform only
